title: brown

messages.description: random value based on brownian motion

methods.description: a float sets seed, no float sets a unique internal

body: [brown] is a control brownian motion generator. It is a bounded random walk (based on a pseudo random number generator algorithm). By default, the maximum step is "0.125", which is a ratio of the whole range (and the output range is from 0 to 127). If it tries to step outside the bounds, it just gets folded back.
